ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vineyards" (
  "vineyard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vineyard */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the vineyard */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the vineyard */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the vineyard */,
  "vineyard_size" REAL /* Size of the vineyard (in hectares) */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil in the vineyard */,
  "climate" TEXT /* Climate of the region */,
  "sun_exposure" TEXT /* Sun exposure of the vineyard (e.g., full sun, partial shade) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vineyard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "harvests" (
  "harvest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each harvest */,
  "vineyard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vineyard from which the harvest was taken */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine produced from this harvest */,
  "harvest_year" INTEGER /* Year of the harvest */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of grapes harvested (in tons) */,
  "quality_rating" REAL /* Quality rating of the harvest (scale 1-10) */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the harvest */,
  "harvest_method" TEXT /* Method used for harvesting (e.g., manual, mechanical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("harvest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_harvests_vineyard_id FOREIGN KEY ("vineyard_id") REFERENCES vineyards ("vineyard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine being analyzed */,
  "harvest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the harvest associated with this analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "lab_name" TEXT /* Name of the laboratory performing the analysis */,
  "result_file" TEXT /* File path to the analysis report */,
  "pH_level" REAL /* pH level of the wine */,
  "total_acidity" REAL /* Total acidity of the wine */,
  "volatile_acidity" REAL /* Volatile acidity of the wine */,
  "residual_sugar" REAL /* Residual sugar content of the wine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_harvest_id FOREIGN KEY ("harvest_id") REFERENCES harvests ("harvest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., winemaker, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality report */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine being assessed */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes regarding the wine quality */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the wine (scale 1-10) */,
  "tasting_notes" TEXT /* Tasting notes for the wine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensory_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensory evaluation */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine being evaluated */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation was performed */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluator */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the wine */,
  "clarity" TEXT /* Clarity of the wine */,
  "aroma" TEXT /* Aroma of the wine */,
  "body" TEXT /* Body of the wine */,
  "acidity" TEXT /* Acidity of the wine */,
  "tannins" TEXT /* Tannins of the wine */,
  "finish" TEXT /* Finish of the wine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensory_evaluations_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES evaluators ("evaluator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluators" (
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the evaluator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the evaluator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the evaluator (e.g., winemaker, sommelier, critic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluator_id")
)
